title: Senior Software Engineer - Swiggy Digital Technologies - Multiple Openings

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Swiggy Digital Technologies - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
We at Swiggy Digital Technologies are looking for an experienced Senior Software Engineer based out of Varanasi. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Swiggy Digital Technologies:
Swiggy Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Node.js

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Professional development and training programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Swiggy Digital Technologies!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
